chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 1047 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No. 4359/26. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.03.2026 Ms. Ghulam Hyder Sheikh, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Tahseen Hyder Abbasi, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. ----------- Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate files Vakalatnama along with parawise comments, reflecting that an FIR has been registered on the allegation that the consignment was mis-declared and enclosing a copy of the Test Report showing the duties and taxes said to be payable in the matter. Learned counsel for the Petitioner seeks that the consignment in question be released provisionally whilst stating that the Petitioner would avail otherwise his remedy in the matter so as to contest the proceedings emanating from the FIR in accordance with law. Conversely, learned counsel appearing on behalf of the Department submits that if an appropriate application under Section 83(B) is made to the competent authority, the same would be decided without undue delay within a period of 7 days in accordance with law after hearing the Petitioner. Let the needful be done accordingly. The Petition stands disposed of in the foregoing terms. Judge Judge Ayaz
